title: Tribuf hierarchy on bidirectional IO buffer insertion

features.name: nested ternary with z in inner branch for inout
features.description: Code should include an inout port assignment using a nested ternary operator where the z literal appears in an inner (non-top) branch of the conditional
features.snippet:
inout wire BI;
assign BI = COND ? 1'b0 : (A ? 1'bz : DATA);
